title: EveningSky
description: A warm sunset-themed sky overlay with soft orange and purple evening tones.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18a531aa9f9a42cfe2fe80037fb1ae72d61d4cdf.jpeg)

**EveningSky** is designed to recreate the beauty of golden hour in Minecraft.
With warm gradients and smooth color transitions, it adds depth and emotion to sunsets and early nights.

It can be layered over the default sky or combined with any texture pack, enhancing atmosphere without affecting gameplay visuals.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
